## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why this is the smallest correct change.

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run ci`
- [ ] `bun run pack:check` when packaging or exports changed
- [ ] New behavior has deterministic tests
- [ ] Protocol or benchmark changes update the specification, methodology, and checked results

## Safety

Describe stale-edit, path, encoding, concurrency, compatibility, and token-cost implications, or
state why they are unaffected.
